value.found_quote: Move sessions between web and terminal with `--remote` and `--teleport`. ... Run `/web-setup` in your terminal to sync your local `gh` CLI token to your Claude account.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the ability to move sessions between the web and terminal using `--remote` and `--teleport` (mentioned in both the page description and the table of contents). It also describes `/web-setup` as a terminal command used to set up GitHub authentication for web sessions. The offering is in "research preview" status for Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise users.
